query:
SELECT 'integration' as type, ai.id, ai.account_id, a.name as account_name, ai.provider_user_name, ai.is_active
FROM account_integrations ai
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = ai.account_id
WHERE ai.provider = 'facebook'

UNION ALL

SELECT 'page' as type, afp.id, afp.account_id, a.name as account_name, afp.page_name, afp.is_subscribed
FROM account_facebook_pages afp
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = afp.account_id

UNION ALL

SELECT 'mapping' as type, fpm.id, fpm.account_id, a.name as account_name, fpm.page_name, 1
FROM facebook_page_mappings fpm
JOIN accounts a ON a.id = fpm.account_id;
